help.title: Help Center
help.s1b: Go to a supported video platform, make sure the target video is opened, click 'Share' (or browser address bar), and copy the link. Or upload a local video file.
help.s2b: Paste video link, or upload video file, then select target language for translation and click the import button.
help.s3b: After backend review and AI translation payment, import will succeed. You can view and launch videos in the list to earn revenue!

about.profileBody: We are a new tech company under Thinking Machines, equipped with the latest AI short-video processing team. Our mission is to empower everyone to freely express their creativity and easily produce short videos, breaking through device and resource limitations. From idea to innovation, we enable anyone to create high-quality AI videos effortlessly. We drive value and innovation through speed, iterating quickly to stay competitive in the fast-changing AI landscape. We embrace challenges, push forward solutions, and create more value for our users. We strive for excellence, focus on practicality and efficiency, and encourage innovation.
about.techBody: Through our powerful technical team, we help users achieve automated short-video conversion and production. With our platform, users can easily transform short videos into multiple languages and distribute them with one click across global platforms, unlocking new revenue opportunities.
about.adv1Body: Cross-border operations often face account registration barriers (such as local identity/IP requirements). Users are forced to use VPNs or purchase overseas accounts, which come with privacy leaks, account suspension risks, and legal disputes (e.g., violating the Data Security Law or Cybersecurity Law). Our platform partners with MCN agencies in multiple countries to build a compliant account pool, and cooperates with official agents of local social platforms. When users select a target region, the system automatically matches them with a local compliant account, avoiding identity misappropriation risks.
about.adv2Body: The platform comes with a large library of legally authorized materials. During editing, AI automatically uses these materials to ensure all elements meet copyright requirements. The AI system can also embed invisible watermarks and digital copyright information, continuously monitoring video content to ensure compliance. Additionally, the platform provides automatic copyright detection and warning mechanisms to eliminate infringement risks in target regions.
about.adv3Body: Through agreements with global partner platforms, our system supports automatic currency conversion of users' revenue at real-time exchange rates when withdrawing funds. This avoids foreign exchange legal risks and simplifies cross-border payments. Regardless of the user's country, our platform ensures convenient and stable payment services.
about.adv4Body: The platform provides professional short-video marketing solutions backed by experienced promotion teams, allowing users to operate with ease. It also offers access to product supply chains and advertising partners across different countries, enabling users to gain secondary and tertiary revenue streams beyond basic viewership monetization, maximizing the commercial value of their short videos.
